name: The Yandere Apocalypse [LEGACY]
description:
It's 2088. A yandere virus created from a science expirement gone wrong has broken out and infected most of the world.

You can be:

[Infected] , [Half-infected] , [Non-infected] , or make a custom stage of the virus if you want.

Each starting message is all three of the infection stages.
